title: Online Procedure Rule Committee: annual open meeting 20 October 2025
body: "The first open meeting of the Online Procedure Rule Committee will take place on 20 October 2025 at 2:15pm via Microsoft Teams.  Guests are invited to attend as observers only. However, the Committee will answer pre-submitted guest questions at the end of the meeting.  Attendance  Due to limitations with the conferencing software, space is limited, and not all applicants may receive an invitation. Potential guests are asked to complete a short application form and return by 4pm on Monday 15 September 2025 to the email address below:     OPRC open meeting: application form  (ODT, 27.9 KB)   Email: OPRC@justice.gov.uk      Format of the meeting  Topics of discussion will include the responses to the public engagement document. The full agenda will be provided before the meeting. "
